title: Biochemical Measures of Neuropathy - Hydrogen Peroxide Assay
author: Eva Feldman
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7rghm3w

steps.title: Prepare stock solutions above for Amplex...
steps.instruction: Prepare stock solutions above for Amplex Red Reagent, Reaction Buffer, HRP, 20 mM H ² O ² and Resorufin, sodium salt.

steps.title: Prepare H ² O ² standard curve
steps.instruction: Prepare H ² O ² standard curve. Label tubes 1-5. Add 999 µL 1X Reaction Buffer to tube 2. Add 100 µL 1X Reaction Buffer to tubes 2 – 5. Add 1 µL of 20 mM H ² O ² working dilution prepared above to tube # 1 to produce concentrations of 20 µM. Take 100 µL from tube 1 and add to tube 2. Take 100 µl from tube 2 and add to tube 3. Take 100 µl from tube 3 and add to tube 4. Tube 5 is dH ² O only. (Final concentration will be twofold lower, 0 to 10 µM.)

steps.title: Pipette 100 µL of diluted standards,...
steps.instruction: Pipette 100 µL of diluted standards, controls (if any) and samples into wells. (For DRG we used 25 µL)

steps.title: From 20 µM stock solution of...
steps.instruction: From 20 µM stock solution of Amplex Red reagent - Prepare 400 µM dilution containing 2 U/mL HRP by adding 20 0µl of Amplex Red stock solution and 100 µL of 200 U/mL HRP stock solution to 9.7 mL of 1X Reaction Buffer.

steps.title: Initiate reaction by adding 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Initiate reaction by adding 100 µL from above to each well.

steps.title: Place plate into Fluroskan holder and click START
steps.instruction: Place plate into Fluroskan holder and click START.

steps.title: Take 4 readings at 15 minute...
steps.instruction: Take 4 readings at 15 minute intervals using 544/590 filter pairs.

steps.title: Save raw data as an Excel...
steps.instruction: Save raw data as an Excel file into the RHPx data folder. Use the naming convention RHXXXX.xls, where XXXX is the date in mmdd format.

steps.title: Select Process>Organize
steps.instruction: Select Process>Organize. Choose the appropriate data to organize (usually Measure1), then click OK . This rearranges the data into columns.

steps.title: Save organized data as an Excel...
steps.instruction: Save organized data as an Excel file into the RHP data folder. Use the naming convention rhXXXXor.xls, where XXXX is the date in mmdd format.
